summary: Issue #406 adds independent Demo deploy automation: juli-demo systemd on 127.0.0.1:3001, demo.app-juli.com nginx vhost, mock-only build/deploy/rollback scripts, HITL runbook, 38 contract tests, and demo-deploy-contracts CI job. No backend secrets; App Review services untouched.

interfaceChanges.description: Adds independent Demo nginx vhost, systemd unit, and deploy/rollback scripts.

mappings.criterion: Demo has its own systemd service/upstream and Nginx vhost without changing app-juli.com or api.app-juli.com ownership
Release automation installs/builds apps/demo, switches releases safely, restarts only the required service, and verifies local health before success
Rollback can restore the previous healthy Demo release independently
Nginx/DNS/TLS/provisioning and rollback steps are documented without secrets
Deploy contract tests verify domain, service, paths, ports/upstreams, release integration, and secret hygiene
CI validates the production Demo build and deployment contracts
Runtime requires no backend credentials or API availability in Mock mode

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no blocking reliability, security, observability, performance, or acceptance-coverage gaps.
